title: 20Pcs Car Fuses 15A Mini Blade Fuses Automotive Replacement Fuse for Caravan Motorcycle Truck RV + Fuse Puller
features: 【High Quality】The car fuse is made of high quality zinc alloy and an insulating plastic for better conductivity and reliability. Protect your car and electrical device from short circuit or overload.
【Size】The standard blade fuse is 11 x 17 x 4 mm, operating voltage: 32 V.

【Easy to identify】The transparent housing indicates the fuse link status. The fuse easy identification by colour-coded plastic housing and engraved amperage rating numbers on the top. A clip makes it easy to replace the vehicle fuse.

【Wide application】The automotive fuse fits most modern vehicles. Ideal for aftermarket modifications and troubleshooting. The auto fuse specially designed for cars, trucks, SUVs, quads, RVs, motorbikes, fleet, golf carts, boats, snowmobiles and general DC applications etc.
【You will Get】20Pcs 15 amp mini car fuse, 1Pcs fuse puller.
description: Bolatus 20Pcs Car Fuse Kit - Mini Blade Fuses Automotive - The right replacement always with you! This fuse protects your car and electrical equipment from overload or short circuit. Often used in cars, trucks, SUVs, motorcycles, boats, general digital camera home applications etc. Specification: Material: Zinc alloy + plastic Operating voltage: 32 V Standard fuse size: 11 x 17 x 4 mm Packaging includes 20 x 15 Amp car fuses 1Pcs Fuse Puller
